title: Uplifting Nutty Tunisian Beef Tagine
description: A warm, nutty tagine bursting with the fragrant flavors of Tunisian spices, tender beef cutlets, and toasted almonds, perfect for an energizing dinner.

ingredients.name: Spice blend
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp each cumin, coriander, cinnamon, harissa

instructions: Heat olive oil in a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion, sliced carrot, and sliced celery, sautéing until softened and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until aromatic.
Add tomato paste and stir until it darkens slightly, about 2 minutes.
Sprinkle the spice blend over the vegetables, tossing to coat evenly, and cook for another minute.
Place beef cutlet strips into the pot, browning each side until seared, about 3 minutes per side.
Pour in chicken broth to deglaze, scraping up any browned bits, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and let the tagine cook gently for 45 minutes, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in toasted almonds, season with salt and pepper, and simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Remove from heat, garnish with fresh parsley if desired, and serve hot over couscous or with crusty bread.
